market.summary: VIP preview sessions continue with steady collector traffic. The newly launched digital art sector is seeing particularly high engagement, complementing the strong sales of modern and contemporary works observed since the opening.
keyTrends: Sustained collector interest in modern classics and contemporary blue-chip works
Market confidence solidified by the 5-year Art Basel Hong Kong extension
High engagement levels for the new digital art and innovation sectors
Robust trade hub activity with international collector presence
Consistent sell-through rates across established and emerging artist categories

highlights: Major Sales: Ongoing strong interest in Picasso, Liu Ye, and Marlene Dumas
Strategic News: 5-year Art Basel host agreement confirmed
Focus: High engagement in the 'Zero 10' digital sector
